name: Anchor Stone
description: At the start of combat, gain 8 Block.

name: Coiled Serpent
description: At the start of combat, gain 2 Strength.

name: Gambler's Deck
description: At the start of combat, draw 1 additional card.

name: Warded Bracer
description: At the start of each turn, gain 3 Block.

name: Focusing Lens
description: At the start of each turn, gain 1 Strength.

name: Frugal Satchel
description: At the end of your turn, if you have 2 or more unspent Energy, gain 2 Block.

name: Thorned Carapace
description: Whenever you take damage, deal 2 damage back to the attacker.

name: Bulwark Charm
description: The first time you take damage each turn, gain 4 Block.

name: Momentum Token
description: Every 3rd card you play in a turn deals 4 damage to an enemy.

name: Skirmisher's Sash
description: Whenever you play a Skill card, gain 1 Block.

name: Ledger of Ruin
description: The first Attack card you play each combat grants 1 Strength for the rest of the fight.

name: Scavenger's Charm
description: Winning a fight with more than half your max HP grants 5 bonus gold.

name: Vampire Fang
description: Whenever you deal damage, heal 1 HP.
